calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeanne Jorge, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff
Mary Ann Meaney, limited scope attorney, appearing in said capacity for Defendant

Settlement Conference held.

Judge Pro Tem: Will Chen Clerk: Anna Redigonda Court Reporter: Peppina Thompson

Parties place a stipulation for judgment on the record as follows: Parties stipulate to entry of Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant in the event of a breach of the following agreement: Defendant shall vacate the premises located at 1910 Divisadero, San Francisco, at 12:00PM on Aug. 15-2006. Defendant will empty the premises of all belongings and possessions and any remaining guests or other occupants. Defendant must also deliver keys to premises to Plaintiff's counsel on said move out date. Defendant represents he is the only adult claiming a right to occupy the premises. In the event that the premises are not rendered vacant as a result of the agreement herein, Defendant shall pay and indemnify plaint. for all attorney's fees and costs incurred to evict any holdover occupant. If def. complies, plaintiff will pay to defendant $10,000 in relocation fees. Parties stipulate there is no security deposit. Any property that is left on the premises after the move out date is abandoned property and may be disposed of by Plaintiff. If defendant fails to comply, Plaintiff may seek ex-parte judgment with 24 hours notice for the rental amount of $10,800.00 and damages in the amount of $30.00 from May 1st, 2006 per day plus atty's fees and costs, and forfeiture of the premises. Subject to and contingent upon defendant's performance of the terms of this stipulation, Plaintiff shall dismiss this action, with prejudice, each party to bear their own atty's fees and costs, and the parties agree that the Clerk shall not allow access to Def's Court records in this action pursuan to CCP sec. 1161.2. There is a mutual release of all claims arising from this action. No stays of execution will be granted.
